global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel booking.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel easily.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A light blue circular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A light blue square shape positioned in the center of the ad, overlapping with the circular shape.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small light blue circle located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' centered at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The text 'RouteBloom' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, travel booking.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, RouteBloom, Shop now
